content: My role was to support game design and narrative design teams. Direction of interaction and UI design was diegetic and minimalistic. I pitched designs to a variety of stakeholders — game director, art lead, UI/UX design lead, game designers. I collaborated with UI and game programmers to bring the designs to life, and reacted to UR feedback to improve in-game systems.
I worked on nearly all parts of the game's systems, interactions, and UI. My biggest contributions to the project were:

sections.alt: Alan Wake 2 case board UI exploration
sections.caption: Alan Wake 2 — case board UI exploration
